name: icu_rct_placebo_strategy
description: ICU/critical care RCTs, with a placebo/sham/usual-care comparator; use query.term for CT.gov API v2.

icu_rct_broad.query.term: AREA[StudyType]INTERVENTIONAL AND AREA[DesignAllocation]RANDOMIZED AND ("intensive care" OR "critical care" OR ICU OR "intensive therapy unit" OR "high dependency unit" OR "critical illness" OR "mechanical ventilation" OR ventilator OR "septic shock" OR "vasopressor" OR ARDS OR "acute respiratory distress" OR "respiratory failure" OR "cardiogenic shock" OR "hemorrhagic shock" OR "haemorrhagic shock" OR ECMO OR "extracorporeal membrane oxygenation" OR "multi-organ failure" OR "organ dysfunction" OR CCU OR MICU OR SICU OR PICU OR NICU OR "traumatic brain injury" OR TBI OR "cardiac arrest" OR "post-cardiac arrest" OR "targeted temperature management" OR "therapeutic hypothermia" OR "major burns" OR "burn resuscitation" OR "major trauma" OR "pulmonary embolism" OR "diabetic ketoacidosis" OR DKA OR "acute liver failure" OR "status epilepticus")

icu_rct_placebo.query.term: AREA[StudyType]INTERVENTIONAL AND AREA[DesignAllocation]RANDOMIZED AND ("intensive care" OR "critical care" OR ICU OR "intensive therapy unit" OR "high dependency unit" OR "critical illness" OR "mechanical ventilation" OR ventilator OR "septic shock" OR "vasopressor" OR ARDS OR "acute respiratory distress" OR "respiratory failure" OR "cardiogenic shock" OR "hemorrhagic shock" OR "haemorrhagic shock" OR ECMO OR "extracorporeal membrane oxygenation" OR "multi-organ failure" OR "organ dysfunction" OR CCU OR MICU OR SICU OR PICU OR NICU OR "traumatic brain injury" OR TBI OR "cardiac arrest" OR "post-cardiac arrest" OR "targeted temperature management" OR "therapeutic hypothermia" OR "major burns" OR "burn resuscitation" OR "major trauma" OR "pulmonary embolism" OR "diabetic ketoacidosis" OR DKA OR "acute liver failure" OR "status epilepticus") AND (placebo OR sham OR "standard care" OR "usual care")

notes.status_filter: none — all statuses included; dashboard shows status stratification
limitations: ClinicalTrials.gov only — trials registered only on other registries (EUCTR, ISRCTN, ANZCTR, ChiCTR, etc.) are not captured
Free-text search — no MeSH structured field queries (CT.gov v2 does not support AREA[ConditionSearch] with MeSH)
All study statuses included (recruiting, completed, withdrawn, terminated) — filter by status in downstream analysis
Geographic bias toward US-centric and industry-sponsored trials due to CT.gov registration patterns
notes.search_terms_added_v2: ARDS, acute respiratory distress, respiratory failure, cardiogenic shock, hemorrhagic shock, haemorrhagic shock (UK spelling), ECMO, extracorporeal membrane oxygenation, multi-organ failure, organ dysfunction, CCU, MICU, SICU, PICU, NICU
notes.search_terms_added_v4: traumatic brain injury, TBI, cardiac arrest, post-cardiac arrest, targeted temperature management, therapeutic hypothermia, major burns, burn resuscitation, major trauma, pulmonary embolism, diabetic ketoacidosis, DKA, acute liver failure, status epilepticus
notes.known_gaps_v4: hepatorenal syndrome, post-resuscitation care (broader than cardiac arrest), polytrauma scoring (ISS/AIS-based), extracorporeal liver support — not yet in search query
notes.negative_context_v3: MAP (excludes MAP kinase/MAPK), EF (excludes elongation/enhancement factor), HR (excludes hazard ratio, sHR, csHR, Cox HR), SV (excludes SV40), PAP (excludes Pap smear), perfusion (excludes cerebral/myocardial perfusion imaging)
notes.grey_literature_note: ClinicalTrials.gov and PubMed are searched. Trials registered exclusively on EUCTR, ISRCTN, ANZCTR, ChiCTR, or other registries without PubMed publications are not captured.

recall_reference_standard.description: Verified CT.gov-registered ICU hemodynamic RCTs for search recall validation. All NCT IDs verified against ClinicalTrials.gov API. Trials registered only on non-CT.gov registries (VASST, VANISH, LeoPARDS, ProMISe) are excluded — they are expected to be absent.
recall_reference_standard.scope_note: Covers septic shock (5), corticosteroids in sepsis (2), ARDS (2), ECMO (1), post-cardiac arrest/TTM (2), TBI (2), pulmonary embolism (1), burns (1), cardiogenic shock (3), hemorrhagic shock (2), DKA (1). Does not yet validate hepatorenal syndrome or acute pancreatitis coverage.
trial_names: ProCESS (NCT00510835) — protocolized care vs usual care in early septic shock
ARISE (NCT00975793) — EGDT vs usual care in septic shock (Australia)
SEPSISPAM (NCT01149278) — MAP 65-70 vs 80-85 mmHg targets in septic shock
CORTICUS (NCT00147004) — hydrocortisone vs placebo in septic shock
ANDROMEDA-SHOCK (NCT03078712) — CRT vs lactate-guided resuscitation in septic shock
HYPRESS (NCT00670254) — hydrocortisone for prevention of septic shock
ATHOS-3 (NCT02338843) — angiotensin II in catecholamine-resistant vasodilatory shock
ACURASYS (NCT00299650) — cisatracurium in early severe ARDS
EOLIA (NCT01470703) — ECMO in severe ARDS
TTM2 (NCT02908308) — targeted hypothermia vs normothermia after out-of-hospital cardiac arrest
THAPCA-OH (NCT00878644) — therapeutic hypothermia after pediatric cardiac arrest
DECRA (NCT00155987) — early decompressive craniectomy in severe TBI
Hypertonic-TBI (NCT00316004) — hypertonic saline resuscitation in severe TBI
PEITHO-3 (NCT04430569) — reduced-dose alteplase vs placebo in intermediate high-risk PE
Burns-FFP (NCT05069922) — FFP vs albumin in acute burn resuscitation
SHOCK Trial (NCT00000552) — emergent revascularization vs medical stabilization in cardiogenic shock
LEVOSIMENDAN-ECMO (NCT04728932) — levosimendan vs placebo for ECMO weaning in cardiogenic shock
SOAP-II (NCT00314704) — dopamine vs norepinephrine as first vasopressor in shock (includes cardiogenic)
RIC-Hemorrhage (NCT02071290) — remote ischemic conditioning in hemorrhagic shock trauma
HSL-Hemorrhage (NCT01433276) — hypertonic sodium lactate vs Ringer's lactate in hemorrhagic shock
DKA-Fluids (NCT05808972) — NaCl 0.9% vs Ringer's lactate in severe DKA
